name: Fillet of Salmon Poached in Lemon and Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet over medium-high heat, bring the lemon juice and wine to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to medium. Add the salmon and cover the skillet.
3. Poach the salmon until it flakes when pressed with a fork (5 to 8 minutes).
4. Remove from poaching liquid and serve immediately, sprinkling with parsley.
